query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `review_photos` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `reviewId` int NOT NULL,
  `photoUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `caption` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `review_photos_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `reviewId` int NOT NULL,
  `photoUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `caption` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `review_photos_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
